questions.q: Which fast-food franchisee sued its parent company in May 2026 for $100 million, alleging its 'Dragontail' AI delivery system caused cascading operational breakdowns?
Seagate shares tumbled in May 2026 after CEO Dave Mosley stated that building new factories to meet AI-driven memory chip demand would result in what?
options: It would violate US export bans

questions.q: In a May 2026 interview, Barnes & Noble CEO James Daunt expressed his willingness to sell which type of controversial content in stores, provided it isn't "masquerading"?
In a May 2026 public letter ahead of its shareholder meeting, Lululemon's board rejected proxy board nominees from which founder, calling his perspectives "misguided"?
Driven by surging power demand for AI data centers, NextEra Energy announced a $66.8 billion all-stock deal in May 2026 to acquire which regulated utility?
